calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-25-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JILL BATES MOORE, TEL. NO. 1-510-985-9250 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
JOAN CHOY, TEL. NO. 1-415-308-6913, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT JOAN CHOY IS DENIED AS MOOT. DEFENDANT HAS NO FUNDS WITH EAST WEST BANK. Order signed. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =(302/SB)

Defendant Joan L. Chung'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Sep-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joan Chung, Tel. 415.308.6913, defendant/judgment debtor/claimant, appearing on her own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The judgment debtor provided the Court with additional information regarding her household's financial status. After hearing, and to the satisfaction of the Court, Defendant Joan L. Chung's Claim Of Exemption is granted in part. $50.00 shall be withheld per pay period. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-13-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JOAN CHUNG, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling with modification. the hearing PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC's OBJECTIONS TO DEFENDANT'S Claim Of Exemption is OFF CALENDAR. Plaintiff failed to attach a sufficient proof of service TO ITS OBJECTIONS TO DEFENDANT'S Claim Of Exemption. Judge: Richard A. Kramer, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR6185.
